formInstance.inputDocument: I, John Michael Doe, hereby authorize the complete background check process, ensuring that all information provided herein is meticulously examined for accuracy and completeness. My personal details are as follows: I reside at 123 Elm St in Springfield, Illinois, 62704, and my date of birth is April 15, 1985. My Social Security Number is 123-45-6789. By consenting to this background check, I affirm that the information I have submitted is correct and truthful. I acknowledge that any false or misleading statements may lead to the rejection of my application.
